command: {"role": "stock_openclaw_baseline", "benchmark_rules": ["Use only the configured pta-benchmark MCP environment.", "Do not inspect repository files, grader code, prior outputs, or expected answers.", "Read the listed MCP resources before selecting irreversible actions.", "If native MCP resources are not directly available, call pta-benchmark__read_benchmark_resource with the resource URI.", "Call MCP benchmark tools directly when action is required.", "Do not use the PTA action proposal schema.", "When finished, reply with exactly one JSON object matching output_structure and no markdown."], "task": {"task_id": "task_06", "prompt": "Identify unpaid bills and generate a safe payment plan.", "hard_constraints": ["Identify all pending bills", "Create a payment plan", "pending_bills must include only unsettled bills", "Alert if total pending bill amount exceeds budget 120."], "preferences": ["User would like to pay less than 100."], "behavior_checklist": ["pending_bills must include only bills where settled is false.", "scheduled_payments must correspond exactly to the unsettled bills that were scheduled.", "Do not include settled bills in pending_bills, even as context."], "resource_uris": ["household-bills://list"], "tool_names": ["schedule_payment"], "tool_schemas": [{"name": "schedule_payment", "description": "Use this tool when the user wants to schedule a mock bill payment.
